textByHashes.e62136b87cb2e8775486c30b230e6b6adaa87d6a: The name is Big Mo. I'm a travelling salesman and businessman from overseas.
textByHashes.cf2f52d16e83e02bd559a5456eb724947072f1d9: I drop by these parts every so often to see what wares I can get my hands on.
textByHashes.f42e8c22927f15f8c13e0668976831ed77905034: Ha! It seems you've got a lot of the world left to explore. hey, maybe I could help you with that.
textByHashes.94726227e7baa4d721dad88b17e1d724324d23aa: When I buy stock, I buy almost everything I can get my hands on. I always end up finding clue scrolls mixed in with my stock.
textByHashes.83340e122976a7b61eab34b4206fa5d9e38574c8: Usually my little brother would follow up on them, often coming back with a big pile of loot.
textByHashes.7ea85b11287a43cc4f4c3494f57fb63930f195db: Unfortunately, my brother got wrapped up in some nasty dealings with some faulty dragon claws so we had to part ways.
textByHashes.2968470abc124ba2a9e132d9339570d69c9f61ba: Since you seem interested in an adventure, you seem like the perfect man for the job!
textByHashes.286b0ed1eee3f70bfc8387929a8962fd817afa87: Since you seem interested in an adventure, you seem like the perfect woman for the job!
textByHashes.9fb945364edebdadc49a53dbb80f03df35776a6c: Not quite. I'm sure you're a lovely chap and all, but I can't trust a stranger!
textByHashes.5544aef3e9e41cb49d95cfb65c3d7edde7345bb6: I'd be more than happy to cut you a deal. I can sell you any clue scrolls I come across for 50gp.
textByHashes.f44d77bc1f5b3681f61ce46cab630d9955efe4f0: I'm sure you'd make a killing on any loot you find.
textByHashes.c4862b08bf0d02b9daf4b7ba718c6a6a50dc8b77: HA! Sure, the guy in the 50,000,000 coin suit is going to run around all day digging holes. Come on! Now, do you want to buy one?
textByHashes.f6377bd12b1753d62bb5e11a3205b9518ee10809: Okay, they're 50 coins each. How much of a challenge would you like? I'll take a look and see if I have a clue fitting for your experience.
textByHashes.5efcc4d67c90d3da75067234d1b2334bb2530013: Perfect! I've got just the clue right here. Pleasure doing business with you!
textByHashes.42476236a7d75c8cb9326ab450289514d37184d4: If you can track me down again another day I will do my best to have the perfect clue for you. Good luck.
textByHashes.c24d03cd38371707b52bded83e10886367b97431: I'm afraid this is the best I can do right now. Pleasure doing business with you!
textByHashes.da1730a17c605e3fe37c07fa86f4e60f24cbd608: Why, hello there! Want to buy another clue scroll?
textByHashes.1849d6a384fb149d7d3a443a481e7ecf2a25255c: The name is Big Mo. I was a travelling salesman and businessman, passing through the towns to see what wares I could get my hands on.
textByHashes.524dd24f5530d603408610819e6ed605e58c9732: I turned up a few years ago, selling clue scrolls to encourage people to explore. I'd only sell each person one clue scroll per day, of course.
textByHashes.0f00b751955c55d0edb87bc0cdcc45a1e38d57c4: HA HA HA! I deliberately didn't tell people where I was from. Mostly they assumed me to be from Zeah.
textByHashes.7de36facad2d9ffda9566c6875930b211e774da9: That may or may not be true, though - no-one else in Zeah looks much like me. I'll leave it as a mystery...
